name: Ubiquiti Wave AP Gen2
title: Ubiquiti Wave AP Gen2
description: The Ubiquiti Wave AP Gen2 is a high-performance 60 GHz PtMP access point designed to deliver ultra-fast and reliable wireless connectivity in urban and high-density environments. Leveraging the 802.11ay standard, the Wave AP Gen2 supports 60 GHz long-range communications with ultra-low latency and interference-free operation. It delivers total throughput of up to 5.4 Gbps and can serve up to 15 Wave Long-Range or Wave Nano stations simultaneously, making it an ideal solution for ISPs and enterprise networks. An integrated 5 GHz radio provides backup connectivity to ensure link continuity during rain fade or obstructions. With its built-in GPS and Bluetooth, deployment and synchronization are streamlined. The AP is housed in a durable outdoor enclosure (IPX6-rated), designed to withstand harsh environmental conditions while ensuring long-term performance stability.

detailed_description.heading: High Performance
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Wave AP Gen2 is a high-performance 60 GHz PtMP access point designed to deliver ultra-fast and reliable wireless connectivity in urban and high-density environments. Leveraging the 802.11ay standard, the Wave AP Gen2 supports 60 GHz long-range communications with ultra-low latency and interference-free operation. It delivers total throughput of up to 5.4 Gbps and can serve up to 15 Wave Long-Range or Wave Nano stations simultaneously, making it an ideal solution for ISPs and enterprise networks. An integrated 5 GHz radio provides backup connectivity to ensure link continuity during rain fade or obstructions. With its built-in GPS and Bluetooth, deployment and synchronization are streamlined. The AP is housed in a durable outdoor enclosure (IPX6-rated), designed to withstand harsh environmental conditions while ensuring long-term performance stability.

detailed_description.heading: Next-Gen Scalability
detailed_description.text: Engineered for scalability, the Wave AP Gen2 features Ubiquiti’s proprietary Wave technology, enabling high-speed multipoint connections across line-of-sight (LOS) and near-line-of-sight (nLOS) scenarios. With beamforming technology and automatic beam steering, the AP ensures highly focused links, improving signal strength and efficiency even in complex environments. Thanks to the Precision Alignment Mount, the Wave AP Gen2 can be installed easily and aimed precisely for optimal coverage. The unit supports 1x 2.5GbE PoE In port, compliant with 802.3af/at, and draws a maximum of 18.5W. Its MU-MIMO capability ensures simultaneous high-throughput performance for multiple stations. Whether expanding broadband access in urban zones or connecting campus buildings, the Wave AP Gen2 meets the needs of service providers and network architects seeking robust, high-speed wireless distribution.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Management
detailed_description.text: The Wave AP Gen2 is managed through the intuitive UISP platform, offering centralized control, real-time performance monitoring, firmware updates, and device configuration. UISP’s web interface and mobile app simplify onboarding and ongoing management, allowing for quick network adjustments and performance optimizations. The access point includes a built-in LED alignment indicator, assisting installers during setup for precise targeting. Its aesthetic, compact form factor allows for discreet mounting on rooftops or poles, maintaining visual appeal in urban deployments. The device’s aluminum housing offers excellent heat dissipation, supporting extended temperature ranges and continuous outdoor operation. Whether part of a large-scale Wave deployment or a targeted high-throughput link, the Wave AP Gen2 offers enterprise-grade performance with ease of use and installation, making it a future-proof solution for modern wireless infrastructure.

items.name: Power Method
items.value: AC/DC Adapter, 24V Passive PoE, 48V Passive PoE
